subcodes.first_line: O Concourse of the Bayán and all who dwell upon the earth! Did ye imagine that ye had truly believed in God and would not thereafter be tested? Nay, indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: أ حسبتم یا ملأ البیان و من فی الأرض بأنکم آمنتم بالله و لا تفتنون من بعد کلا
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
